description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu Docker image with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs `apt update && apt -y install g++ make libyaml-cpp-dev` in before_script and then executes `make noMEGAlib`. Also add a debug-build job that runs `apt update && apt -y install g++ git make libyaml-cpp-dev libdw-dev` in before_script and then `make debug-noMEGAlib`. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs `apt update && apt -y install make autoconf g++ doxygen doxygen-doc doxygen-latex doxygen-gui libyaml-cpp-dev` and `doxygen Doxyfile`, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
